title: UltraCosmetics
description: Lightweight, Fun and Easy-to-Use Spigot Cosmetics plugin. (Gadgets, etc)
body:
![UltraCosmetics](https://puu.sh/E6GuW/414e92c886.png)

[![Wiki](https://puu.sh/E6GCc/b783e4f248.png)](https://github.com/UltraCosmetics/UltraCosmetics/wiki) [![Discord support](https://puu.sh/E6GEP/ed333b8d29.png)](https://discord.gg/UKAnmXC)
[![Report issues](https://puu.sh/E6GIY/9a5ba4eb6d.png)](https://github.com/UltraCosmetics/UltraCosmetics/issues)

[![Rocket gadget](https://media.giphy.com/media/mCmdkCJs5RPIMfCsbn/giphy.gif) ![Fire waves effect](https://media.giphy.com/media/IdNZiMsCbGYXLpzZq4/giphy.gif) ![Slime snake mount](https://media.giphy.com/media/TiZwj60YnSsOOrC0ud/giphy.gif)](https://discord.me/ucsupport)

## Features
- Forever 100% free!
- Open source
- Large community
- MySQL support
- Lightweight
- Highly customizable
- Translations
- Treasure chests
- EULA friendly
- A lot of content:
  - 28 Gadgets
  - 70+ Pets
  - 20+ Mounts
  - 60+ Morphs
  - 13 Emotes
  - 150+ Hats
  - 30+ Particle Effects
  - 7 Suits

[![Sponsored by Ember Host](https://i.imgur.com/ZMjmzDW.png)](https://billing.ember.host/aff.php?aff=15)
Ember Host is a sponsor of UltraCosmetics! By signing up with the affiliate link above or code `ULTRACOSMETICS`, you will get 10% off, and we will receive 70% of purchases made in the first month.

[![Source Code](https://puu.sh/E6HlK/6a984b661e.png)](https://github.com/UltraCosmetics/UltraCosmetics)

Help translate the plugin on [Crowdin](https://crowdin.com/project/ultracosmetics)!
